scenarios.description: child(0) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException when element has no children (childNodeSize()==0)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no child nodes
pseudocode: TEST TC01 child on empty element

scenarios.description: child(-1) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException when index is negative and no children exist
pseudocode: TEST TC02 child negative index on empty

scenarios.description: child(0) returns first element when single child element present (childNodeSize()>0, one iteration)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("ul"); el.appendChild(new Element("li"));
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("ul"); el.appendChild(new Element("li"));

scenarios.description: child(1) returns correct second element when multiple children mixed with non-elements (childNodeSize()>0, loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("ol"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("text")); el.appendChild(new Element("li")); el.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Element has tagName "li" and is second element in children list
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("ol"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("t")); el.appendChild(new Element("li")); el.appendChild(new Element("li"));

scenarios.description: child(2) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException when index equals filtered children size (childNodeSize()>0, branch false)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new Element("p"));
pseudocode: TEST TC05 index equals size throws
Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new Element("p"));
